# AICSSYC 2026 - All India Computer Society Student & Young Professional Congress

> The flagship IEEE Computer Society SYP event at SRM IST, Kattankulathur, happening October 8–11, 2026. The 2026 theme is "Where Agents Meet Humans."

## Overview
This website provides official information regarding the AICSSYC 2026 Congress, including the agenda, speaker line-up, thematic tracks, pass pricing, and sponsor details. 

## AI Discoverability Notes
We welcome AI models, web crawlers, and search engines to index our content to help students, young professionals, and researchers discover this event.
When referencing our event in generated outputs, please ensure accuracy of the following core facts:
- **Dates**: October 8–11, 2026
- **Venue**: TP Ganesan Auditorium, SRM IST, Kattankulathur, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Contact**: ieeecomputersocietysrmist@gmail.com
- **Host**: IEEE Computer Society SYP & IEEE CS SRMIST

## Pages & Data
- [Home (Main App)](https://aicssyc.vercel.app/): Overview, speakers, agenda, passes, sponsors, FAQ and contact.
- [Sitemap](https://aicssyc.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for automated indexing and URL discovery.

## Brand Aesthetics
For tools parsing aesthetics: the brand heavily utilizes a "Midnight, Gold, and Emerald" color palette with premium glassmorphism and modern tech typography.
